SEARCH
Package DAO

Class TableDAO

java.lang.Object
DAO.TableDAO
public class TableDAO extends Object
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing restaurant tables. Handles CRUD operations and availability checks against the 'tables' database table.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TableDAO()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addTable(Table t)
    Adds a new table to the database.
    int
    countSuitableTables(int numberOfGuests)
    Counts how many tables exist that have at least the specified number of seats.
    int
    countTotalPhysicalTables(int minSeats)
    Counts total physical tables with at least minSeats.
    boolean
    deleteTable(int tableNumber)
    Deletes a table from the database.
    Integer
    findAvailableTable(int guests)
    Finds a specific available table number for a group of guests.
    List<Integer>
    getAllTableCapacities()
    Retrieves distinct capacity sizes available in the restaurant (all tables).
    List<Integer>

    Retrieves capacity sizes of currently *unoccupied* tables only.

    getAllTables()
    Retrieves all tables from the database regardless of their status.

    Finds the table with the absolute smallest capacity in the restaurant.

    Retrieves a specific table by its number.
    boolean
    updateTable(Table t)
    Updates the number of seats for a specific table.
    boolean

    Updates the physical occupancy status of a table.

  • Constructor Details

    • TableDAO

      public TableDAO()

  • Method Details

    • getAllTables

      public List<Table> getAllTables() throws SQLException
      Retrieves all tables from the database regardless of their status.
      Returns:
      A list of all Table objects.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • addTable

      public boolean addTable(Table t) throws SQLException
      Adds a new table to the database.
      Parameters:
      t - The Table object to add.
      Returns:
      true if the insertion was successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getSmallestCapacityTable

      public Table getSmallestCapacityTable() throws SQLException
      Finds the table with the absolute smallest capacity in the restaurant.
      Returns:
      The smallest Table object.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateTable

      public boolean updateTable(Table t) throws SQLException
      Updates the number of seats for a specific table.
      Parameters:
      t - The Table object containing the new seat count and ID.
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • deleteTable

      public boolean deleteTable(int tableNumber) throws SQLException
      Deletes a table from the database.
      Parameters:
      tableNumber - The ID of the table to delete.
      Returns:
      true if the deletion was successful.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getTable

      public Table getTable(int tableNumber) throws SQLException
      Retrieves a specific table by its number.
      Parameters:
      tableNumber - The ID of the table.
      Returns:
      The Table object, or null if not found.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • countSuitableTables

      public int countSuitableTables(int numberOfGuests) throws SQLException
      Counts how many tables exist that have at least the specified number of seats.
      Parameters:
      numberOfGuests - The minimum capacity required.
      Returns:
      The count of suitable tables.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • findAvailableTable

      public Integer findAvailableTable(int guests) throws SQLException
      Finds a specific available table number for a group of guests. Uses a "Best Fit" strategy: finds the smallest table that fits the guests which is currently unoccupied.
      Parameters:
      guests - The number of guests.
      Returns:
      The table number if found, or null if no table is available.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateTableStatus

      public boolean updateTableStatus(int tableNumber, int isOccupied) throws SQLException
      Updates the physical occupancy status of a table.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getAllTableCapacities

      public List<Integer> getAllTableCapacities()
      Retrieves distinct capacity sizes available in the restaurant (all tables).
      Returns:
      List of capacities.

    • getAllTableCapacities2

      public List<Integer> getAllTableCapacities2()
      Retrieves capacity sizes of currently *unoccupied* tables only. Used for validiting immediate seating in waiting list logic.
      Returns:
      List of capacities of free tables.

    • countTotalPhysicalTables

      public int countTotalPhysicalTables(int minSeats) throws SQLException
      Counts total physical tables with at least minSeats. Similar to countSuitableTables but used in specific waiting list contexts.
      Parameters:
      minSeats - Minimum seats required.
      Returns:
      Count of tables.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.
